keyEvents.text: Substitution, Portugal. Nélson Semedo replaces Nuno Mendes because of an injury.
Substitution, Portugal. Diogo Dalot replaces João Cancelo.
Substitution, Portugal. Rafael Leão replaces João Félix.
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Álex Baena.
Substitution, Portugal. Francisco Conceição replaces Pedro Neto.
Substitution, Portugal. Bernardo Silva replaces Vitinha.
Substitution, Spain. Fabián Ruiz replaces Pedri.
Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.
Bernardo Silva (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Portugal 0, Spain 1. Mikel Merino (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ferran Torres with a through ball.
Renato Veiga (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Spain. Borja Iglesias replaces Mikel Oyarzabal.
Ferran Torres (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! USA 0, Belgium 1. Charles De Ketelaere (Belgium) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Nicolas Raskin.
Substitution, Belgium. Hans Vanaken replaces Amadou Onana because of an injury.
Goal! USA 1, Belgium 1. Malik Tillman (USA) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the high centre of the goal.
Goal! USA 1, Belgium 2. Charles De Ketelaere (Belgium) header from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Leandro Trossard with a cross.
Weston McKennie (USA) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, USA. Giovanni Reyna replaces Sergiño Dest.
Goal! USA 1, Belgium 3. Hans Vanaken (Belgium) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Charles De Ketelaere.
Substitution, USA. Sebastian Berhalter replaces Christian Pulisic because of an injury.
Substitution, Belgium. Jérémy Doku replaces Dodi Lukébakio.
Substitution, Belgium. Romelu Lukaku replaces Charles De Ketelaere.
Malik Tillman (USA) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, USA. Ricardo Pepi replaces Tyler Adams.
Substitution, Belgium. Alexis Saelemaekers replaces Leandro Trossard.
Substitution, Belgium. Axel Witsel replaces Nicolas Raskin.
Substitution, USA. Max Arfsten replaces Antonee Robinson.
Substitution, USA. Haji Wright replaces Folarin Balogun.
Goal! USA 1, Belgium 4. Romelu Lukaku (Belgium) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Hans Vanaken.
Goal! Argentina 0, Egypt 1. Yasser Ibrahim (Egypt) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Marwan Attia with a cross following a corner.
Penalty saved. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot saved in the bottom right corner by Mostafa Shobeir (Egypt).
Substitution, Egypt. Hamdi Fathy replaces Emam Ashour because of an injury.
Mostafa Zico (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
Substitution, Argentina. Nico González replaces Nicolás Tagliafico.
Substitution, Argentina. Lautaro Martínez replaces Rodrigo De Paul.
Goal! Argentina 0, Egypt 2. Mostafa Zico (Egypt) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Haissem Hassan following a fast break.
